items.arab: وَهُوَ الْأَثَرُ الْمَشْهُورُعَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ حَدَّثَ عَنِّي بِحَدِيثٍ يُرَى أَنَّهُ كَذِبٌ فَهُوَ أَحَدُ الْكَاذِبِينَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي لَيْلَى عَنْ سَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ ح و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ أَيْضًا حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ وَسُفْيَانَ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ مَيْمُونِ بْنِ أَبِي شَبِيبٍ عَنْ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ قَالَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ذَلِكَ
items.id: And he was the famous atsar of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, "Whoever narrates a hadith from me, which is alleged to be a lie, then he (the narrator) is one of those liars." Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Waki'] from [Syu'bah] from [al Hakam] from [Abdurrahman bin Abu Laila] from [Samurah bin Jundab]. (in another narration it is mentioned) and has also told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Waki'] from [Syu'bah] and [Sufyan] from [Habib] from [Maimun bin Abu Syabib] from [al-Mughirah bin Syu'bah] both said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said about this."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا غُنْدَرٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ ح و حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى وَابْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ رِبْعِيِّ بْنِ حِرَاشٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ عَلِيًّا رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ يَخْطُبُ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَا تَكْذِبُوا عَلَيَّ فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ يَكْذِبْ عَلَيَّ يَلِجْ النَّارَ
items.id: And has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Ghundar] from [Syu'bah] (in another narration it is mentioned) And has told us [Muhammad bin al Mutsanna] and [Ibn Basysyar] both said, have told us [Muhammad bin Ja'far] has told us [Syu'bah] from [Mansur] from [Rib'i bin Hirasy] that he heard [Ali] preaching, he said, "The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allaah be upon him) said: "Do not lie in my name, because whoever lies in my name will surely go to hell."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي زُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَعِيلُ يَعْنِي ابْنَ عُلَيَّةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ صُهَيْبٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَإِنَّهُ لَيَمْنَعُنِي أَنْ أُحَدِّثَكُمْ حَدِيثًا كَثِيرًا أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ مَنْ تَعَمَّدَ عَلَيَّ كَذِبًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنْ النَّارِ
items.id: Has told us [Zuhair bin Harb] has told us [Ismail] - namely Ibn 'Ulayyah - from [Abdul Aziz bin Shuhaib] from [Anas bin Malik] that he said, 'Indeed, something that prevents me from telling you many hadiths is, that the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Whoever deliberately commits a lie in my name, let him take his seat from hell'."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ الْغُبَرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ أَبِي حَصِينٍ عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنْ النَّارِ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Ubaid al-Ghubari] has told us [Abu Awanah] from [Abu Hashin] from [Abu Salih] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Whoever lies in my name, let him occupy his seat from hell."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ رَبِيعَةَ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَالْمُغِيرَةُ أَمِيرُ الْكُوفَةِ قَالَ فَقَالَ الْمُغِيرَةُسَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ كَذِبًا عَلَيَّ لَيْسَ كَكَذِبٍ عَلَى أَحَدٍ فَمَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنْ النَّارِو حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ السَّعْدِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُسْهِرٍ أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ الْأَسْدِيُّ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رَبِيعَةَ الْأَسَدِيِّ عَنْ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِمِثْلِهِ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ إِنَّ كَذِبًا عَلَيَّ لَيْسَ كَكَذِبٍ عَلَى أَحَدٍ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Abdullah bin Numair] has told us [my father] has told us [Sa'id bin 'Ubaid] has told us [Ali bin Rabi'ah] he said, "I went to the mosque while al-Mughirah, the governor of Kufa. He said, "Then [al-Mughirah] said, 'I heard the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "Truly lying in my name is not the same as lying in someone's name, whoever lies in my name intentionally, let him take his seat from hell." And it has been told to me [Ali bin Hujr as Sa'di] has told us [Ali bin Mushir] has told us [Muhammad bin Qais al Asdi] from [Ali bin Rabi'ah al Asdi] from [al-Mughirah bin Syu'bah] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with an example of this hadith, only he did not say, "Indeed, lying in my name is not the same as lying in someone else's name."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي ح و حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ خُبَيْبِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كَفَى بِالْمَرْءِ كَذِبًا أَنْ يُحَدِّثَ بِكُلِّ مَا سَمِعَو حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَفْصٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ خُبَيْبِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِمِثْلِ ذَلِكَ
items.id: And has told us [Ubaidullah bin Mu'adz al Anbari] has told us [my father] (in another narration it is mentioned), And has told us [Muhammad bin al Mutsanna] has told us [Abdurrahman bin Mahdi] both of them said, has told us [Syu'bah] from [Khubaib bin Abdurrahman] from [Hafsh bin Ashim] he said, "Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "It is enough for a person (to be considered) to be lying if he tells everything he hears." Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Ali bin Hafsh] has told us [Syu'bah] from [Khubaib bin Abdurrahman] from [Hafsh bin 'Ashim] from [Abu Hurairah] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with the same hadith."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ وَزُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو هَانِئٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ مُسْلِمِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَعَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ سَيَكُونُ فِي آخِرِ أُمَّتِي أُنَاسٌ يُحَدِّثُونَكُمْ مَا لَمْ تَسْمَعُوا أَنْتُمْ وَلَا آبَاؤُكُمْ فَإِيَّاكُمْ وَإِيَّاهُمْ
items.id: And it has been told to us [Muhammad bin Abdullah bin Numair] and [Zuhair bin Harb] both said, has told us [Abdullah bin Yazid] he said, has told me [Sa'id bin Abu Ayyub] he said, has told me [Abu Hani'] from [Abu Uthman Muslim bin Yasar] from [Abu Hurairah] from the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, that he said: "It will be there are people at the end of my ummah telling you a hadith which you have never heard and neither have your fathers heard it, so stay away from them and stay away from them."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي حَرْمَلَةُ بْنُ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ حَرْمَلَةَ بْنِ عِمْرَانَ التُّجِيبِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو شُرَيْحٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ شَرَاحِيلَ بْنَ يَزِيدَ يَقُولُ أَخْبَرَنِي مُسْلِمُ بْنُ يَسَارٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُاقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَكُونُ فِي آخِرِ الزَّمَانِ دَجَّالُونَ كَذَّابُونَ يَأْتُونَكُمْ مِنْ الْأَحَادِيثِ بِمَا لَمْ تَسْمَعُوا أَنْتُمْ وَلَا آبَاؤُكُمْ فَإِيَّاكُمْ وَإِيَّاهُمْ لَا يُضِلُّونَكُمْ وَلَا يَفْتِنُونَكُمْ
items.id: Has told me [Harmalah bin Yahya bin Abdullah bin Harmalah bin Imran at-Tujibi] he has said, has told us [Ibn Wahb] he said, has told us [Abu Syuraih] that he heard [Syarahil bin Yazid] say, has told me [Muslim bin Yasar] that he heard [Abu Hurairah] say, "The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allaah be upon him) said: "There will be At the end of time, the Dajjal liars will bring hadiths to you that you have never heard of and your fathers have never heard of either. So stay away from them and stay away from them. They cannot mislead you and cannot slander you."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو خَيْثَمَةَ زُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ كَهْمَسٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ يَعْمَرَ ح و حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ وَهَذَا حَدِيثُهُ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا كَهْمَسٌ عَنْ ابْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ يَعْمَرَ قَالَ كَانَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ قَالَ فِي الْقَدَرِ بِالْبَصْرَةِ مَعْبَدٌ الْجُهَنِيُّ فَانْطَلَقْتُ أَنَا وَحُمَيْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْحِمْيَرِيُّ حَاجَّيْنِ أَوْ مُعْتَمِرَيْنِ فَقُلْنَا لَوْ لَقِينَا أَحَدًا مِنْ أَصْحَابِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَسَأَلْنَاهُ عَمَّا يَقُولُ هَؤُلَاءِ فِي الْقَدَرِ فَوُفِّقَ لَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ دَاخِلًا الْمَسْجِدَ فَاكْتَنَفْتُهُ أَنَا وَصَاحِبِي أَحَدُنَا عَنْ يَمِينِهِ وَالْآخَرُ عَنْ شِمَالِهِ فَظَنَنْتُ أَنَّ صَاحِبِي سَيَكِلُ الْكَلَامَ إِلَيَّ فَقُلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ إِنَّهُ قَدْ ظَهَرَ قِبَلَنَا نَاسٌ يَقْرَءُونَ الْقُرْآنَ وَيَتَقَفَّرُونَ الْعِلْمَ وَذَكَرَ مِنْ شَأْنِهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ يَزْعُمُونَ أَنْ لَا قَدَرَ وَأَنَّ الْأَمْرَ أُنُفٌ قَالَ فَإِذَا لَقِيتَ أُولَئِكَ فَأَخْبِرْهُمْ أَنِّي بَرِيءٌ مِنْهُمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ بُرَآءُ مِنِّي وَالَّذِي يَحْلِفُ بِهِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ لَوْ أَنَّ لِأَحَدِهِمْ مِثْلَ أُحُدٍ ذَهَبًا فَأَنْفَقَهُ مَا قَبِلَ اللَّهُ مِنْهُ حَتَّى يُؤْمِنَ بِالْقَدَرِثُمَّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ بَيْنَمَا نَحْنُ عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ إِذْ طَلَعَ عَلَيْنَا رَجُلٌ شَدِيدُ بَيَاضِ الثِّيَابِ شَدِيدُ سَوَادِ الشَّعَرِ لَا يُرَى عَلَيْهِ أَثَرُ السَّفَرِ وَلَا يَعْرِفُهُ مِنَّا أَحَدٌ حَتَّى جَلَسَ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَسْنَدَ رُكْبَتَيْهِ إِلَى رُكْبَتَيْهِ وَوَضَعَ كَفَّيْهِ عَلَى فَخِذَيْهِ وَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ أَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ الْإِسْلَامِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الْإِسْلَامُ أَنْ تَشْهَدَ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَتُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِيَ الزَّكَاةَ وَتَصُومَ رَمَضَانَ وَتَحُجَّ الْبَيْتَ إِنْ اسْتَطَعْتَ إِلَيْهِ سَبِيلًا قَالَ صَدَقْتَ قَالَ فَعَجِبْنَا لَهُ يَسْأَلُهُ وَيُصَدِّقُهُ قَالَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ الْإِيمَانِ قَالَ أَنْ تُؤْمِنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ وَتُؤْمِنَ بِالْقَدَرِ خَيْرِهِ وَشَرِّهِ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ قَالَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ الْإِحْسَانِ قَالَ أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللَّهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَرَاكَ قَالَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ السَّاعَةِ قَالَ مَا الْمَسْئُولُ عَنْهَا بِأَعْلَمَ مِنْ السَّائِلِ قَالَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ أَمَارَتِهَا قَالَ أَنْ تَلِدَ الْأَمَةُ رَبَّتَهَا وَأَنْ تَرَى الْحُفَاةَ الْعُرَاةَ الْعَالَةَ رِعَاءَ الشَّاءِ يَتَطَاوَلُونَ فِي الْبُنْيَانِ قَالَ ثُمَّ انْطَلَقَ فَلَبِثْتُ مَلِيًّا ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي يَا عُمَرُ أَتَدْرِي مَنْ السَّائِلُ قُلْتُ اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ قَالَ فَإِنَّهُ جِبْرِيلُ أَتَاكُمْ يُعَلِّمُكُمْ دِينَكُمْحَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ الْغُبَرِيُّ وَأَبُو كَامِلٍ الْجَحْدَرِيُّ وَأَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدَةَ قَالُوا حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ مَطَرٍ الْوَرَّاقِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ يَعْمَرَ قَالَ لَمَّا تَكَلَّمَ مَعْبَدٌ بِمَا تَكَلَّمَ بِهِ فِي شَأْنِ الْقَدَرِ أَنْكَرْنَا ذَلِكَ قَالَ فَحَجَجْتُ أَنَا وَحُمَيْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْحِمْيَرِيُّ حَجَّةً وَسَاقُوا الْحَدِيثَ بِمَعْنَى حَدِيثِ كَهْمَسٍ وَإِسْنَادِهِ وَفِيهِ بَعْضُ زِيَادَةٍ وَنُقْصَانُ أَحْرُفٍ و حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَاتِمٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْقَطَّانُ حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ غِيَاثٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ يَعْمَرَ وَحُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَا لَقِينَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ عُمَرَ فَذَكَرْنَا الْقَدَرَ وَمَا يَقُولُونَ فِيهِ فَاقْتَصَّ الْحَدِيثَ كَنَحْوِ حَدِيثِهِمْ عَنْ عُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَفِيهِ شَيْءٌ مِنْ زِيَادَةٍ وَقَدْ نَقَصَ مِنْهُ شَيْئًا و حَدَّثَنِي حَجَّاجُ بْنُ الشَّاعِرِ حَدَّثَنَا يُونُسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْمُعْتَمِرُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ يَعْمَرَ عَنْ ابْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ عُمَرَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِنَحْوِ حَدِيثِهِمْ
items.id: Has told me [Abu Khaitsamah Zuhair bin Harb] has told us [Waki'] from [Kahmas] from [Abdullah bin Buraidah] from [Yahya bin Ya'mar]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And it has been told to us [Ubaidullah bin Mu'adz al-'Anbari] and this is the hadith, it has been told to us [my father] has been told to us [Kahmas] from [Ibn Buraidah] from [Yahya bin Ya'mar] he said, "The person who was the first to discuss destiny in Basrah was Ma'bad al-Juhani, so I and Humaid bin Abdurrahman al-Himyari went on Hajj or Umrah, then we said, 'If we were to meet one of the companions of the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then we would ask him about something they said related to destiny.' So [Abdullah bin Umar] was given taufik (by Allah) for us, while he was entering the mosque. Then my friend and I confronted him. One of us was on his right and the other on his left. Then I thought that my friend would delegate the conversation to me, so I said, 'O Abu Abdurrahman, actually there appears before us a people reading the Koran and seeking knowledge and then claiming that there is no destiny, and the matter is new (not preceded by destiny and Allah's knowledge).' So [Abdullah bin Umar] answered, 'When you meet these people, then tell them that I am leaving them, and that they are leaving me. And by the One whom Allah's servants swear by, if one of you spends gold like Mount Uhud, his alms will certainly not be accepted until he believes in good and bad destiny.' He said, 'Then he began to narrate the hadith and said, ['Umar bin al-Khaththab] said, 'Once we were at the side of the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then a man came whose clothes were very white, his hair was very black, and no traces of his travels were visible on him. None of us knew him, until he came to the Prophet Shallallahu 'Alaihi Wasalam and leaned his knee on the knee of the Prophet Shallallahu 'Alaihi Wasalam, then he said, 'O Muhammad, tell me about Islam? ' Rasulullah Sallallahu 'Alaihi Wasalam answered: "Testify that there is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah and that Muhammad is His servant and messenger, establish prayers, pay zakat, and fast Ramadlan, and make a pilgrimage to Baitullah if you are able to travel to him." He said, 'You're right.' Umar said, 'So we were surprised at him because he asked about it and confirmed it.' He asked again, 'Tell me about this faith? ' He answered: "You believe in Allah, His angels, His books, His Messengers, the last day, and good and bad destiny." He said, 'You're right.' He asked, 'Tell me about the ihsan? ' He answered: "You worship Allah as if you see Him, so if you do not see Him, then indeed He sees you." He asked again, 'When will the last day be? ' He answered: "The person who is asked does not know better than the person who asks." He asked, 'Then tell me about the signs? ' He answered: "If a slave gives birth to her master's (child), and you see a person who is barefoot, naked, poor, a goat herder, but gloating in building buildings." Then he left. So I was still surprised then he said; "O Umar, do you know who the questioner is?" I answered, 'Allah and His Messenger know better.' He said: "That is Gabriel, he came to you to teach you about your religious knowledge." It has been told to us [Muhammad bin Ubaid al-Ghubari] and [Abu Kamil al-Jahdari] and [Ahmad bin Abdah] they said, has told us [Hammad bin Yazid] from [Mathar al Warraq] from [Abdullah bin Buraidah] from [Yahya bin Ya'mar] he said, 'When Ma'bad said something that he spoke about the matter of destiny, then we denied it.' He said again, 'Then I performed the Hajj with Humaid bin Abdurrahman al-Himyari.' Then they mentioned the hadith with the meaning of the Kahmas hadith. In it there are some additions and omissions of letters." And has told us [Muhammad bin Hatim] has told us [Yahya bin Sa'id al Qaththan] has told us [Uthman bin Ghiyats] has told us [Abdullah bin Buraidah] from [Yahya bin Ya'mar] and [Humaid bin Abdurrahman] both said, "We met [Abdullah bin Umar], then we mentioned about fate and their opinion about it, then he narrated the hadith as their hadith is from [Umar] radlialllahu 'anhuma from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, and in it there are additions and subtractions." And has told us [Hajjaj bin ash-Sya'ir] has told us [Yunus bin Muhammad] has told us [al-Mu'tamir] from [his father] from [Yahya bin Ya'mar] from [Ibn Umar] from [Umar] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with examples of their hadith."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ وَزُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ جَمِيعًا عَنْ ابْنِ عُلَيَّةَ قَالَ زُهَيْرٌ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِي حَيَّانَ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَكَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمًا بَارِزًا لِلنَّاسِ فَأَتَاهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِيمَانُ قَالَ أَنْ تُؤْمِنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكِتَابِهِ وَلِقَائِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَتُؤْمِنَ بِالْبَعْثِ الْآخِرِ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِسْلَامُ قَالَ الْإِسْلَامُ أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللَّهَ وَلَا تُشْرِكَ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةَ الْمَكْتُوبَةَ وَتُؤَدِّيَ الزَّكَاةَ الْمَفْرُوضَةَ وَتَصُومَ رَمَضَانَ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِحْسَانُ قَالَ أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللَّهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ لَا تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَرَاكَ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَتَى السَّاعَةُ قَالَ مَا الْمَسْئُولُ عَنْهَا بِأَعْلَمَ مِنْ السَّائِلِ وَلَكِنْ سَأُحَدِّثُكَ عَنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا إِذَا وَلَدَتْ الْأَمَةُ رَبَّهَا فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا وَإِذَا كَانَتْ الْعُرَاةُ الْحُفَاةُ رُءُوسَ النَّاسِ فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا وَإِذَا تَطَاوَلَ رِعَاءُ الْبَهْمِ فِي الْبُنْيَانِ فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا فِي خَمْسٍ لَا يَعْلَمُهُنَّ إِلَّا اللَّهُ ثُمَّ تَلَا صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ{ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عِنْدَهُ عِلْمُ السَّاعَةِ وَيُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا فِي الْأَرْحَامِ وَمَا تَدْرِي نَفْسٌ مَاذَا تَكْسِبُ غَدًا وَمَا تَدْرِي نَفْسٌ بِأَيِّ أَرْضٍ تَمُوتُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ }قَالَ ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ الرَّجُلُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رُدُّوا عَلَيَّ الرَّجُلَ فَأَخَذُوا لِيَرُدُّوهُ فَلَمْ يَرَوْا شَيْئًا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ هَذَا جِبْرِيلُ جَاءَ لِيُعَلِّمَ النَّاسَ دِينَهُمْحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بِشْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو حَيَّانَ التَّيْمِيُّ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ مِثْلَهُ غَيْرَ أَنَّ فِي رِوَايَتِهِ إِذَا وَلَدَتْ الْأَمَةُ بَعْلَهَا يَعْنِي السَّرَارِيَّ
items.id: And has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] and [Zuhair bin Harb] everything from [Ibn Ulayyah], [Zuhair] said, has told us [Ismail bin Ibrahim] from [Abu Hayyan] from [Abu Zur'ah bin Amru bin Jarir] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam was one day in the presence of people, then a man came to him while saying, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is faith? ' He answered, 'You believe in Allah, His angels, His book, believe in the events of meeting Him, believe in His Messengers, and you believe in the final day of resurrection' He asked, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is Islam? Ramadlan.' He asked again, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is ihsan? ' He answered, 'You worship Allah as if you see Him, so if you do not see Him then indeed He sees you.' He asked again, 'O Messenger of Allah, when will the Day of Resurrection be? ' He answered, 'No one who is asked about it knows the answer better than the one who asks, but I will tell you about the signs; that is, when a female servant gives birth to her master. That's one of the signs. (Second) if a naked person without shoes becomes a human leader. That's one of the signs. (Third) if goat herders compete with each other to build (erect) buildings. That is one of the signs in the five signs, no one knows it except Allah," then he sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam read: '(Verily, Allah, only with Him is the knowledge of the Day of Judgment; and He is the One Who sends down rain, and knows what is in the womb. And no one can know (for sure) what He will do tomorrow. And no one can know where on earth he will die. Indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Knowing)' (Qs. Luqman: 34). Then the man left again. So the Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allaah be upon him) said: "Call the man back to face me." at-Taimi] with this sanad hadith is like that, only in the narration there is the sentence, 'If a female servant gives birth to her husband, namely concubines'.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنِي زُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ عُمَارَةَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ الْقَعْقَاعِ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ سَلُونِي فَهَابُوهُ أَنْ يَسْأَلُوهُ فَجَاءَ رَجُلٌ فَجَلَسَ عِنْدَ رُكْبَتَيْهِ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِسْلَامُ قَالَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِاللَّهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِيمَانُ قَالَ أَنْ تُؤْمِنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكِتَابِهِ وَلِقَائِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَتُؤْمِنَ بِالْبَعْثِ وَتُؤْمِنَ بِالْقَدَرِ كُلِّهِ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْإِحْسَانُ قَالَ أَنْ تَخْشَى اللَّهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ لَا تَكُنْ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَرَاكَ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَتَى تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ قَالَ مَا الْمَسْئُولُ عَنْهَا بِأَعْلَمَ مِنْ السَّائِلِ وَسَأُحَدِّثُكَ عَنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا إِذَا رَأَيْتَ الْمَرْأَةَ تَلِدُ رَبَّهَا فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ الْحُفَاةَ الْعُرَاةَ الصُّمَّ الْبُكْمَ مُلُوكَ الْأَرْضِ فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ رِعَاءَ الْبَهْمِ يَتَطَاوَلُونَ فِي الْبُنْيَانِ فَذَاكَ مِنْ أَشْرَاطِهَا فِي خَمْسٍ مِنْ الْغَيْبِ لَا يَعْلَمُهُنَّ إِلَّا اللَّهُ ثُمَّ قَرَأَ{ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عِنْدَهُ عِلْمُ السَّاعَةِ وَيُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا فِي الْأَرْحَامِ وَمَا تَدْرِي نَفْسٌ مَاذَا تَكْسِبُ غَدًا وَمَا تَدْرِي نَفْسٌ بِأَيِّ أَرْضٍ تَمُوتُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ }قَالَ ثُمَّ قَامَ الرَّجُلُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رُدُّوهُ عَلَيَّ فَالْتُمِسَ فَلَمْ يَجِدُوهُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ هَذَا جِبْرِيلُ أَرَادَ أَنْ تَعَلَّمُوا إِذْ لَمْ تَسْأَلُوا
items.id: Has told us [Zuhair bin Harb] has told us [Jarir] from [Umarah] - namely Ibn al-Qa'qa' - from [Abu Zur'ah] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: 'You ask me'. But they were afraid and reluctant to ask him. So a man came and sat in front of his knees, The man asked, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is Islam? ' He answered, 'Islam is that you do not associate partners with Allah with anything, perform prayers, pay zakat, and fast during Ramadan.' He said, 'You're right.' Then he asked again, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is faith? ' He answered, 'You believe in Allah, His angels, His book, believe in the incident of meeting Him, believe in His Messengers, and you believe in the Day of Resurrection and believe in the destiny of all'. He said, 'You're right'. Then he asked again, 'O Messenger of Allah, what is ihsan? ' He answered, 'You fear (khasyyah) Allah as if you see Him, so if you do not see Him then truly He sees you.' He said, 'You're right'. Then he asked again, 'O Messenger of Allah, when will the Day of Judgment be? ' He answered, 'No one who is asked about it knows the answer better than the one who asks, but I will tell you about the signs; that is, when you see a female slave giving birth to her master. That's one of the signs. (Secondly) if you see people who are barefoot, deaf, and dumb become leaders (humans) on earth. That's one of the signs. (Third) if you see goat herders racing each other to the heights in (erecting) buildings. That is one of the signs in the five signs of occultation, no one knows it except Allah," then he read: '(Indeed, Allah alone has the knowledge of the Day of Judgment; and He is the One Who sends down rain, and knows what is in the womb. And no one can know (with certainty) what He will do tomorrow. And no one can know on which earth he will die. Indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Knowing)" (Qs. Luqman: 34). Then the man got up (resigned), then the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Call him to face me! ' So he was sought, but they did not find him. So Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "This man is Jibril who wants you to study (religion) because you do not ask."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جَمِيلِ بْنِ طَرِيفِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الثَّقَفِيُّ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ فِيمَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِ عَنْ أَبِي سُهَيْلٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ طَلْحَةَ بْنَ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ يَقُولُاجَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنْ أَهْلِ نَجْدٍ ثَائِرُ الرَّأْسِ نَسْمَعُ دَوِيَّ صَوْتِهِ وَلَا نَفْقَهُ مَا يَقُولُ حَتَّى دَنَا مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَإِذَا هُوَ يَسْأَلُ عَنْ الْإِسْلَامِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ خَمْسُ صَلَوَاتٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ وَاللَّيْلَةِ فَقَالَ هَلْ عَلَيَّ غَيْرُهُنَّ قَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ تَطَّوَّعَ وَصِيَامُ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ هَلْ عَلَيَّ غَيْرُهُ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ تَطَّوَّعَ وَذَكَرَ لَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الزَّكَاةَ فَقَالَ هَلْ عَلَيَّ غَيْرُهَا قَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ تَطَّوَّعَ قَالَ فَأَدْبَرَ الرَّجُلُ وَهُوَ يَقُولُ وَاللَّهِ لَا أَزِيدُ عَلَى هَذَا وَلَا أَنْقُصُ مِنْهُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَفْلَحَ إِنْ صَدَقَحَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ أَيُّوبَ وَقُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ جَمِيعًا عَنْ إِسْمَعِيلَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سُهَيْلٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ طَلْحَةَ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ نَحْوَ حَدِيثِ مَالِكٍ غَيْرَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَفْلَحَ وَأَبِيهِ إِنْ صَدَقَ أَوْ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَبِيهِ إِنْ صَدَقَ
items.id: It has been told to us [Qutaibah bin Sa'id bin Jamil bin Tharif bin Abdullah ats-Tsaqafi] from [Malik bin Anas] in the narration which was read over him, from [Abu Suhail] from [his father] that he heard [Thalhah bin Ubaidullah] say, "A man from the people of Nejd whose hair stood on end came to the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, we heard the murmur of his voice, but we could not understand anything he said. say it until he was close to Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, apparently he asked about Islam. So Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam answered: 'Islam is praying five times a day and night.' He asked again, 'Do I still have obligations apart from Him? ' He answered: 'No, unless you perform sunnah prayers and fast in Ramadan.' He asked, 'Do I still have obligations apart from Him? ' He answered: 'No, unless you observe sunnah fasting, and the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam mentions (the obligation of) zakat to him.' He asked again, 'Do I still have obligations apart from Him? ' He answered: 'No, unless you do sunnah alms'." The narrator said, "Then the man withdrew his leave while he said, 'By Allah, I will not add more than this nor subtract from it'. Then the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "He will be happy if he is right (doing it)'." Has told us [Yahya bin Ayyub] and [Qutaibah bin Sa'id] everything from [Ismail bin Ja'far] from [Abu Suhail] from [his father] from [Thalhah bin Ubaidullah] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with this hadith like Malik's hadith, only he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "He will be happy, -for the sake of his father- if he is right', or he will enter heaven, -for the sake of his father- if he is right'."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنِي عَمْرُو بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بُكَيْرٍ النَّاقِدُ حَدَّثَنَا هَاشِمُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ أَبُو النَّضْرِ حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَنُهِينَا أَنْ نَسْأَلَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَكَانَ يُعْجِبُنَا أَنْ يَجِيءَ الرَّجُلُ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبَادِيَةِ الْعَاقِلُ فَيَسْأَلَهُ وَنَحْنُ نَسْمَعُ فَجَاءَ رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبَادِيَةِ فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ أَتَانَا رَسُولُكَ فَزَعَمَ لَنَا أَنَّكَ تَزْعُمُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ أَرْسَلَكَ قَالَ صَدَقَ قَالَ فَمَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاءَ قَالَ اللَّهُ قَالَ فَمَنْ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ قَالَ اللَّهُ قَالَ فَمَنْ نَصَبَ هَذِهِ الْجِبَالَ وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا مَا جَعَلَ قَالَ اللَّهُ قَالَ فَبِالَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاءَ وَخَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ وَنَصَبَ هَذِهِ الْجِبَالَ آللَّهُ أَرْسَلَكَ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَزَعَمَ رَسُولُكَ أَنَّ عَلَيْنَا خَمْسَ صَلَوَاتٍ فِي يَوْمِنَا وَلَيْلَتِنَا قَالَ صَدَقَ قَالَ فَبِالَّذِي أَرْسَلَكَ آللَّهُ أَمَرَكَ بِهَذَا قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَزَعَمَ رَسُولُكَ أَنَّ عَلَيْنَا زَكَاةً فِي أَمْوَالِنَا قَالَ صَدَقَ قَالَ فَبِالَّذِي أَرْسَلَكَ آللَّهُ أَمَرَكَ بِهَذَا قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَزَعَمَ رَسُولُكَ أَنَّ عَلَيْنَا صَوْمَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فِي سَنَتِنَا قَالَ صَدَقَ قَالَ فَبِالَّذِي أَرْسَلَكَ آللَّهُ أَمَرَكَ بِهَذَا قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَزَعَمَ رَسُولُكَ أَنَّ عَلَيْنَا حَجَّ الْبَيْتِ مَنْ اسْتَطَاعَ إِلَيْهِ سَبِيلًا قَالَ صَدَقَ قَالَ ثُمَّ وَلَّى قَالَ وَالَّذِي بَعَثَكَ بِالْحَقِّ لَا أَزِيدُ عَلَيْهِنَّ وَلَا أَنْقُصُ مِنْهُنَّ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَئِنْ صَدَقَ لَيَدْخُلَنَّ الْجَنَّةَحَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ الْعَبْدِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا بَهْزٌ حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَنَسٌ كُنَّا نُهِينَا فِي الْقُرْآنِ أَنْ نَسْأَلَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنْ شَيْءٍ وَسَاقَ الْحَدِيثَ بِمِثْلِهِ
items.id: Has told us [Amru bin Muhammad bin Bukair an-Naqid] has told us [Hasyim bin al-Qasim Abu an-Nadlr] has told us [Sulaiman bin al-Mughirah] from [Tsabit] from [Anas bin Malik] he said, "We were prevented from asking the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam about something, namely our admiration for the arrival of a man from the desert inhabitants who was intelligent (intelligent), then he asked, while we heard it, then a man from the desert people came and said, 'O Muhammad, your messenger came to us, then claimed for us that you claimed that Allah sent you.' Rasulullah replied: 'That's right'. He asked, 'Who created the heavens? ' Rasulullah replied: 'Allah.' He asked, 'Who created the earth? ' Rasulullah replied: 'Allah.' He asked, 'Who established these mountains and made everything in them that He created? ' He answered: 'Allah.' He asked, 'So by the One who created the heavens, created the earth, and established these mountains, is it Allah who sent you? ' He answered: 'Yes.' He asked, 'Your messenger claims that we are obliged to pray five times a day and night, (is this true)? ' He answered: 'That's right'. He asked, 'By the One who sent you, did Allah order you to do this? ' He answered: 'Yes'. He asked, 'Your messenger claims that it is mandatory for us to fast during Ramadan every year, (is this true)? ' He answered: 'Yes'. He asked, 'By the One who sent you, did Allah order you to do this? ' He answered: 'Yes'. He asked, 'Your messenger claims that we are obliged to perform Hajj for which of us is able to follow His path, (is this true)? ' He answered, 'Yes, that's right'. Then he turned and said, 'By the One who sent you with the truth, I will not add to this obligation and will not subtract from it'. So the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "If (what he said) is true, he will truly enter heaven." Has told us [Abdullah bin Hasyim al-Abdi] has told us [Bahz] has told us [Sulaiman bin al-Mughirah] from [Thabit] he said, [Anas] said, "We were prevented from asking about something from the Qur'an to the Messenger of Allah." Then he brought a hadith with an example.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عُثْمَانَ حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ طَلْحَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو أَيُّوبَأَنَّ أَعْرَابِيًّا عَرَضَ لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَهُوَ فِي سَفَرٍ فَأَخَذَ بِخِطَامِ نَاقَتِهِ أَوْ بِزِمَامِهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَوْ يَا مُحَمَّدُ أَخْبِرْنِي بِمَا يُقَرِّبُنِي مِنْ الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا يُبَاعِدُنِي مِنْ النَّارِ قَالَ فَكَفَّ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثُمَّ نَظَرَ فِي أَصْحَابِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَقَدْ وُفِّقَ أَوْ لَقَدْ هُدِيَ قَالَ كَيْفَ قُلْتَ قَالَ فَأَعَادَ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَصِلُ الرَّحِمَ دَعْ النَّاقَةَو حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَاتِمٍ وَعَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ بِشْرٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا بَهْزٌ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَوْهَبٍ وَأَبُوهُ عُثْمَانُ أَنَّهُمَا سَمِعَا مُوسَى بْنَ طَلْحَةَ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِمِثْلِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Abdullah bin Numair] has told us [my father] has told us [Amru bin Uthman] has told us [Musa bin Talhah] he said, has told me [Abu Ayyub], that a Bedouin obstructed the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam while he was on a journey, then he took the reins of his camel or its reins, then he said, 'O Rasulullah, or O Muhammad, Tell me about something that brings me closer to heaven and something that keeps me away from hell? ' The narrator said, 'Then the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam stopped then looked at his companions, then said: "He has been given taufik or has been given guidance.' He asked, 'What did you say? ' The narrator said, 'Then he repeated it'. So the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "You worship Allah, do not offend Him with anything, perform prayers, pay zakat, and connect ties of friendship, then leave the camel." "Has told us [Muhammad bin Hatim] and [Abdurrahman bin Bisyr] both said, has told us [Bahz] has told us [Syu'bah] has told us [Muhammad bin Uthman bin Abdullah bin Mauhab] and his father [Uthman] that both of them heard [Musa bin Talhah] tell from [Abu Ayyub] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam something like this hadith."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ يَحْيَى التَّمِيمِيُّ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ ح و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَقَ عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ طَلْحَةَ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ قَالَجَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ دُلَّنِي عَلَى عَمَلٍ أَعْمَلُهُ يُدْنِينِي مِنْ الْجَنَّةِ وَيُبَاعِدُنِي مِنْ النَّارِ قَالَ تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَصِلُ ذَا رَحِمِكَ فَلَمَّا أَدْبَرَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِمَا أُمِرَ بِهِ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَوَفِي رِوَايَةِ ابْنِ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ إِنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهِ
items.id: Has told us [Yahya bin Yahya at-Tamimi] has told us [Abu al-Ahwash]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And it has been told to us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Abu al-Ahwash] from [Abu Ishaq] from [Musa bin Talhah] from [Abu Ayyub] he said, "A man came to the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, and asked, 'Show me a practice that brings me closer to heaven and keeps me away from hell? ' He answered: 'You worship Allah, don't you? shirk Him with anything, perform prayers, pay zakat, maintain friendship with the family." When he said goodbye, the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "If he sticks to what he has been ordered to do, he will surely enter heaven." And in a history of [Ibn Abu Syaibah], "If he sticks to it."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَقَ حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ حَدَّثَنَا وُهَيْبٌ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَأَنَّ أَعْرَابِيًّا جَاءَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ دُلَّنِي عَلَى عَمَلٍ إِذَا عَمِلْتُهُ دَخَلْتُ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ الْمَكْتُوبَةَ وَتُؤَدِّي الزَّكَاةَ الْمَفْرُوضَةَ وَتَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ قَالَ وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَا أَزِيدُ عَلَى هَذَا شَيْئًا أَبَدًا وَلَا أَنْقُصُ مِنْهُ فَلَمَّا وَلَّى قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى ال��َّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَى رَجُلٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ فَلْيَنْظُرْ إِلَى هَذَا
items.id: And has told me [Abu Bakr bin Ishaq] has told us [Affan] has told us [Wuhaib] has told us [Yahya bin Sa'id] from [Abu Zur'ah] from [Abu Hurairah] that a Bedouin came to the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and said, 'O Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, show me which deeds if I practice them. will I go to heaven? ' He answered: 'You worship Allah, do not shirk Him with anything, perform the obligatory prayers, pay the obligatory zakat, and fast during Ramadan.' He said, 'By the One in Whose Hand my soul is, I will not add to this in the slightest forever nor subtract from it.' When he said goodbye, the Messenger of Allah said: "Whoever wants to see a man from the people of heaven, let him look at him."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ وَأَبُو كُرَيْبٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لِأَبِي كُرَيْبٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَأَتَى النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ النُّعْمَانُ بْنُ قَوْقَلٍ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذَا صَلَّيْتُ الْمَكْتُوبَةَ وَحَرَّمْتُ الْحَرَامَ وَأَحْلَلْتُ الْحَلَالَ أَأَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَعَمْو حَدَّثَنِي حَجَّاجُ بْنُ الشَّاعِرِ وَالْقَاسِمُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّاءَ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُوسَى عَنْ شَيْبَانَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ وَأَبِي سُفْيَانَ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ قَالَ النُّعْمَانُ بْنُ قَوْقَلٍ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ بِمِثْلِهِ وَزَادَا فِيهِ وَلَمْ أَزِدْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ شَيْئًا
items.id: Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] and [Abu Kuraib] and Abu Kuraib's lafazhnya, both of them said, has told us [Abu Mu'awiyah] from [al-A'masy] from [Abu Sufyan] from [Jabir] he said, "An-Nu'man bin Qauqal came to the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and asked, 'O Messenger of Allah, what do you think when I pray obligatory, forbidding something that is haram and allowing something that is halal, will I enter heaven? ' The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam answered: 'Yes'." And has told me [Hajjaj bin ash-Sya'ir] and [al-Qasim bin Zakariya'] both of them said, has told us [Ubaidullah bin Musa] from [Syaiban] from [al-A'masy] from [Abu Salih] and [Abu Sufyan] from [Jabir] he said, 'An-Nu'man bin Qauqal said, 'O Messenger of Allah', with such a report, only he adding, 'And I will not add one iota to that.'

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي سَلَمَةُ بْنُ شَبِيبٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ أَعْيَنَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْقِلٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍأَنَّ رَجُلًا سَأَلَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذَا صَلَّيْتُ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْمَكْتُوبَاتِ وَصُمْتُ رَمَضَانَ وَأَحْلَلْتُ الْحَلَالَ وَحَرَّمْتُ الْحَرَامَ وَلَمْ أَزِدْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ شَيْئًا أَأَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَاللَّهِ لَا أَزِيدُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ شَيْئًا
items.id: Has told me [Salamah bin Syabib] has told us [al-Hasan bin A'yan] has told us [Ma'qil] - namely Ibn Ubaidullah - from [Abu az-Zubair] from [Jabir] that a man asked the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, "What do you think if I perform the obligatory prayers, fast in Ramadlan, make things lawful, and make things unlawful? something that is haram, but I do not add any practice to it, will I go to heaven?" Rasulullah replied: "Yes." He said, "By Allah, I will not add to this practice in the slightest."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو خَالِدٍ يَعْنِي سُلَيْمَانَ بْنَ حَيَّانَ الْأَحْمَرَ عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ الْأَشْجَعِيِّ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عُبَيْدَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ عُمَرَعَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسَةٍ عَلَى أَنْ يُوَحَّدَ اللَّهُ وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ وَصِيَامِ رَمَضَانَ وَالْحَجِّفَقَالَ رَجُلٌ الْحَجُّ وَصِيَامُ رَمَضَانَ قَالَ لَا صِيَامُ رَمَضَانَ وَالْحَجُّ هَكَذَا سَمِعْتُهُ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Abdullah bin Numair al-Hamdani] has told us [Abu Khalid] - namely Sulaiman bin Hayyan al-Ahmar - from [Abu Malik al-Asyja'i] from [Sa'ad bin Ubaidah] from [Ibn Umar] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, he said: "Islam is built on five foundations: Namely that Allah be united, establish prayer, fulfill zakat, Ramadlan fasting and Hajj." A man asked, 'What is Hajj and (then) fasting Ramadan'. He answered: 'No, fasting for Ramadan and (then) Hajj.' Thus I heard it from the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا سَهْلُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ الْعَسْكَرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ زَكَرِيَّاءَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ طَارِقٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَعْدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدَةَ السُّلَمِيُّ عَنْ ابْنِ عُمَرَعَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ عَلَى أَنْ يُعْبَدَ اللَّهُ وَيُكْفَرَ بِمَا دُونَهُ وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ وَحَجِّ الْبَيْتِ وَصَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ
items.id: Has told us [Sahl bin Uthman al-Askari] has told us [Yahya bin Zakariya] has told us [Sa'ad bin Thariq] he said, has told me [Sa'ad bin Ubaidah as-Sulami] from [Ibn Umar] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, he said: "Islam was founded on five foundations: Namely that Allah be worshiped and that other things should be discredited, establishing prayers, fulfilling zakat, pilgrimage to Baitullah, and fasting during Ramadan."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ وَحَجِّ الْبَيْتِ وَصَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ
items.id: Has told us [Ubaidullah bin Mu'adz] has told us [my father] has told us [Ashim] - namely Ibnu Muhammad bin Zaid bin Abdullah bin Umar - from [his father] he said; [Abdullah] said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Islam is built on five foundations: Namely the testimony that there is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah, that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger, establishing prayers, paying zakat, making the pilgrimage to Baitullah, and fasting during Ramadan."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي ابْنُ نُمَيْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا حَنْظَلَةُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عِكْرِمَةَ بْنَ خَالِدٍ يُحَدِّثُ طَاوُسًا أَنَّ رَجُلًا قَالَ لِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَأَلَا تَغْزُو فَقَالَ إِنِّي سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْإِسْلَامَ بُنِيَ عَلَى خَمْسٍ شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ وَصِيَامِ رَمَضَانَ وَحَجِّ الْبَيْتِ
items.id: And having told me [Ibn Numair] had told us [my father] had told us [Hanzhalah] he said, "I heard [Ikrimah bin Khalid] relate a hadith to Thawus that a man said to [Abdullah bin Umar], 'Why don't you fight?' (who has the right to be worshiped besides Allah, to perform prayers, to pay zakat, to fast during Ramadan and to make the pilgrimage to Baitullah'."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا خَلَفُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَمْرَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ ح و حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ يَحْيَى وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبَّادُ بْنُ عَبَّادٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَمْرَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَقَدِمَ وَفْدُ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّا هَذَا الْحَيَّ مِنْ رَبِيعَةَ وَقَدْ حَالَتْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ كُفَّارُ مُضَرَ فَلَا نَخْلُصُ إِلَيْكَ إِلَّا فِي شَهْرِ الْحَرَامِ فَمُرْنَا بِأَمْرٍ نَعْمَلُ بِهِ وَنَدْعُو إِلَيْهِ مَنْ وَرَاءَنَا قَالَ آمُرُكُمْ بِأَرْبَعٍ وَأَنْهَاكُمْ عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ الْإِيمَانِ بِاللَّهِ ثُمَّ فَسَّرَهَا لَهُمْ فَقَالَ شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ وَأَنْ تُؤَدُّوا خُمُسَ مَا غَنِمْتُمْ وَأَنْهَاكُمْ عَنْ الدُّبَّاءِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالنَّقِيرِ وَالْمُقَيَّرِزَادَ خَلَفٌ فِي رِوَايَتِهِ شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَعَقَدَ وَاحِدَةً
items.id: Has told us [Khalaf bin Hisham] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Abu Jamrah] he said, I heard [Ibn Abbas]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And has told us [Yahya bin Yahya] and this lafazh is his, has reported to us [Abbad bin Abbad] from [Abu Jamrah] from [Ibn Abbas] he said, "The messenger of Abdul Qais faced Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and they said, 'O Rasulullah, indeed this village belongs to the tribe of Rabi'ah, and indeed the Mudlar infidels have stood between us and you, so we cannot be safe from you except during the Haram month, so order us to carry out a command and we will preach it to those behind us.' He said: "I command you with four things and forbid you from four things: Namely faith in Allah," then he interpreted it for them while saying: "Testifying that there is no god (worthy of worship) but Allah and that Muhammad is the messenger of Allah, establishing prayers, paying zakat, and paying one-fifth of the spoils of war. And I forbid you not to make pressed wine in ad-Duba`, al-Hantam, an Naqir and al-Muqayyar." Khalaf added in his narration, "Testimony that there is no god (worthy of worship) except Allah. And tie it once."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ وَأَلْفَاظُهُمْ مُتَقَارِبَةٌ قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا غُنْدَرٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ و قَالَ الْآخَرَانِ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ أَبِي جَمْرَةَ قَالَ كُنْتُ أُتَرْجِمُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ وَبَيْنَ النَّاسِ فَأَتَتْهُ امْرَأَةٌ تَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ نَبِيذِ الْجَرِّ فَقَالَإِنَّ وَفْدَ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ أَتَوْا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ الْوَفْدُ أَوْ مَنْ الْقَوْمُ قَالُوا رَبِيعَةُ قَالَ مَرْحَبًا بِالْقَوْمِ أَوْ بِالْوَفْدِ غَيْرَ خَزَايَا وَلَا النَّدَامَى قَالَ فَقَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّا نَأْتِيكَ مِنْ شُقَّةٍ بَعِيدَةٍ وَإِنَّ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ هَذَا الْحَيَّ مِنْ كُفَّارِ مُضَرَ وَإِنَّا لَا نَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ نَأْتِيَكَ إِلَّا فِي شَهْرِ الْحَرَامِ فَمُرْنَا بِأَمْرٍ فَصْلٍ نُخْبِرْ بِهِ مَنْ وَرَاءَنَا نَدْخُلُ بِهِ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ فَأَمَرَهُمْ بِأَرْبَعٍ وَنَهَاهُمْ عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ قَالَ أَمَرَهُمْ بِ��لْإِيمَانِ بِاللَّهِ وَحْدَهُ وَقَالَ هَلْ تَدْرُونَ مَا الْإِيمَانُ بِاللَّهِ قَالُوا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ قَالَ شَهَادَةُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَإِقَامُ الصَّلَاةِ وَإِيتَاءُ الزَّكَاةِ وَصَوْمُ رَمَضَانَ وَأَنْ تُؤَدُّوا خُمُسًا مِنْ الْمَغْنَمِ وَنَهَاهُمْ عَنْ الدُّبَّاءِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالْمُزَفَّتِقَالَ شُعْبَةُ وَرُبَّمَا قَالَ النَّقِيرِ قَالَ شُعْبَةُ وَرُبَّمَا قَالَ الْمُقَيَّرِ وَقَالَ احْفَظُوهُ وَأَخْبِرُوا بِهِ مِنْ وَرَائِكُمْ و قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ فِي رِوَايَتِهِ مَنْ وَرَاءَكُمْ وَلَيْسَ فِي رِوَايَتِهِ الْمُقَيَّرِ و حَدَّثَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي ح و حَدَّثَنَا نَصْرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْجَهْضَمِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي قَالَا جَمِيعًا حَدَّثَنَا قُرَّةُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَمْرَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ نَحْوَ حَدِيثِ شُعْبَةَ وَقَالَ أَنْهَاكُمْ عَمَّا يُنْبَذُ فِي الدُّبَّاءِ وَالنَّقِيرِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالْمُزَفَّتِ وَزَادَ ابْنُ مُعَاذٍ فِي حَدِيثِهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِلْأَشَجِّ أَشَجِّ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ إِنَّ فِيكَ خَصْلَتَيْنِ يُحِبُّهُمَا اللَّهُ الْحِلْمُ وَالْأَنَاةُ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] and [Muhammad bin al-Mutsanna] and [Muhammad bin Basysyar] and their lafazh are close to each other, [Abu Bakr] said, has told us [Ghundar] from [Shu'bah] while the other two people said, have told us [Muhammad bin Ja'far] has told us [Shu'bah] from [Abu Jamrah] he said, "I became a translator between [Ibn Abbas] and the people, then a woman came and asked about the juice of Nabidz (a kind of wine) which was kept in an earthenware vessel, so she answered, 'Indeed, the messenger of Abd al-Qais came to the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then the Messenger of Allah said: "Who is that messenger - or who is that people? - they answered, 'Rabi'ah'. He said: "Welcome the people - or the messenger - without hesitation or regret." The narrator said, 'They said, 'O Messenger of Allah, indeed we have come to you from a far away place. Between us and you there are Mudlar infidels so that we cannot come to you except in the haram months, so order us to decide something that we can tell to the people we lead by which we can enter heaven.' The narrator said, 'So the Messenger of Allah ordered them four things and forbade them four things.' The narrator said again, 'The Messenger of Allah ordered them to believe in Allah alone, saying, 'Do you know what faith in Allah is? ' They answered, 'Allah and His Messenger know better.' He said: "Testify that there is no god but Allah, and that Muhammad is the messenger of Allah, establish prayers, pay zakat, fast Ramadlan, and pay one-fifth of the ghanimah, and forbid you from ad-Duba`, al-Hantam and al-Muzaffat." Syu'bah said, "it could be that he said 'an-Naqir' and it could be 'al-Muqayyar', he said: "Take care of him and inform your people." Abu Bakr mentioned in his narration, 'The person you lead behind you' without mentioning 'al-Muqayyar'." And it has been told to me [Ubaidullah bin Mu'adz] has told it to us [my father]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And he has told us [Nashr bin Ali al-Jahdlami] he said, has told me [my father] both of them said, has told us [Qurrah bin Khalid] from [Abu Jamrah] from [Ibn Abbas] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with this hadith similar to the hadith [Syu'bah], while saying: "I forbid you from anything that is extorted in ad-Duba`, an-Naqir, al-Hantam and al-Muzaffat." And [Ibn Mu'adz] added in his hadith from [his father], he said, 'And the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said to al-Asyyaj Asyajj Abd al-Qais: 'Indeed in you there are two characters favored by Allah, namely patience and caution'."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَيُّوبَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عُلَيَّةَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَرُوبَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَنْ لَقِيَ الْوَفْدَ الَّذِينَ قَدِمُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنْ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ قَالَ سَعِيدٌ وَذَكَرَ قَتَادَةُ أَبَا نَضْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ فِي حَدِيثِهِ هَذَا أَنَّ أُنَاسًا مِنْ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ قَدِمُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالُوا يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ إِنَّا حَيٌّ مِنْ رَبِيعَةَ وَبَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ كُفَّارُ مُضَرَ وَلَا نَقْدِرُ عَلَيْكَ إِلَّا فِي أَشْهُرِ الْحُرُمِ فَمُرْنَا بِأَمْرٍ نَأْمُرُ بِهِ مَنْ وَرَاءَنَا وَنَدْخُلُ بِهِ الْجَنَّةَ إِذَا نَحْنُ أَخَذْنَا بِهِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ آمُرُكُمْ بِأَرْبَعٍ وَأَنْهَاكُمْ عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَلَا تُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئًا وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَصُومُوا رَمَضَانَ وَأَعْطُوا الْخُمُسَ مِنْ الْغَنَائِمِ وَأَنْهَاكُمْ عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ عَنْ الدُّبَّاءِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالْمُزَفَّتِ وَالنَّقِيرِ قَالُوا يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ مَا عِلْمُكَ بِالنَّقِيرِ قَالَ بَلَى جِذْعٌ تَنْقُرُونَهُ فَتَقْذِفُونَ فِيهِ مِنْ الْقُطَيْعَاءِ قَالَ سَعِيدٌ أَوْ قَالَ مِنْ التَّمْرِ ثُمَّ تَصُبُّونَ فِيهِ مِنْ الْمَاءِ حَتَّى إِذَا سَكَنَ غَلَيَانُهُ شَرِبْتُمُوهُ حَتَّى إِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ أَوْ إِنَّ أَحَدَهُمْ لَيَضْرِبُ ابْنَ عَمِّهِ بِالسَّيْفِ قَالَ وَفِي الْقَوْمِ رَجُلٌ أَصَابَتْهُ جِرَاحَةٌ كَذَلِكَ قَالَ وَكُنْتُ أَخْبَؤُهَا حَيَاءً مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقُلْتُ فَفِيمَ نَشْرَبُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ فِي أَسْقِيَةِ الْأَدَمِ الَّتِي يُلَاثُ عَلَى أَفْوَاهِهَا قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ أَرْضَنَا كَثِيرَةُ الْجِرْذَانِ وَلَا تَبْقَى بِهَا أَسْقِيَةُ الْأَدَمِ فَقَالَ نَبِيُّ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَإِنْ أَكَلَتْهَا الْجِرْذَانُ وَإِنْ أَكَلَتْهَا الْجِرْذَانُ وَإِنْ أَكَلَتْهَا الْجِرْذَانُ قَالَ وَقَالَ نَبِيُّ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِأَشَجِّ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ إِنَّ فِيكَ لَخَصْلَتَيْنِ يُحِبُّهُمَا اللَّهُ الْحِلْمُ وَالْأَنَاةُ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى وَابْنُ بَشَّارٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي غَيْرُ وَاحِدٍ لَقِيَ ذَاكَ الْوَفْدَ وَذَكَرَ أَبَا نَضْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ أَنَّ وَفْدَ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ لَمَّا قَدِمُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِمِثْلِ حَدِيثِ ابْنِ عُلَيَّةَ غَيْرَ أَنَّ فِيهِ وَتَذِيفُونَ فِيهِ مِنْ الْقُطَيْعَاءِ أَوْ التَّمْرِ وَالْمَاءِ وَلَمْ يَقُلْ قَالَ سَعِيدٌ أَوْ قَالَ مِنْ التَّمْرِ
items.id: Has told us [Yahya bin Ayyub] has told us [Ibn Ulayyah] has told us [Sa'id bin Abu Arubah] from [Qatadah] he said, "The person who met the messenger from among Abdul Qais who came before the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam told us, [Sa'id] said, [Qatadah] mentioned [Abu Dlamrah] from [Abu Sa'id al-Khudri] in this hadith, that people from among Abdul Qais approached Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and said, 'O Prophet of Allah, indeed we are villagers from the tribe of Rabi'ah, and indeed the Mudlar (infidels) have stood between us and you, so that we cannot (safely) go to you except in the Haram month, so order us to carry out a command so that we can preach it to the people behind us so that with it we can enter paradise if we stick to it.' He said: "I command you four things and forbid you from four things: namely, worship Allah, and do not shirk Him with anything, offer prayers, pay zakat, fast in Ramadan, and give one-fifth of the price of ghanimah, and I forbid you to make wine presses in ad-Duba`, al-Hantam, al-Muzaffat and an-Naqir." They asked, 'O Prophet of Allah, what is your knowledge of an-Naqir? ' He said: "The trunk of a tree is carved (hollowed out) and then you put dates into it." Sa'id said, "Or he said: "from the date palm tree. Then you put water in it until when the boiling water has calmed down, then you drink it until one of you - or one of them - will actually hit his uncle with a sword', he said, 'And in that group there was a man who was injured too.' He said again, 'I hid it because I was ashamed of the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then I asked, 'So in what container can we drink, O Messenger of Allah? ' He answered, 'In a (tanned) leather container which had its mouth closed.' They asked, 'O Messenger of Allah, indeed our land is full of rats, so that there is no drink left in the (tanned) leather vessels,' then the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "And even if it is eaten by rats, and even if it is eaten by rats, and even if it is eaten by rats." The narrator said, "And the Prophet of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said to Asyajj Abdul Qais: 'Indeed in you there are two qualities that Allah likes, namely; be patient and careful'." Has told us [Muhammad bin al-Mutsanna] and [Ibn Basysyar] both said, has told us [Ibn Abu Adi] from [Sa'id] from [Qatadah] he said, has told us not only one narrator met the messenger. And [Abu Nadlrah] mentioned from [Abu Sa'id al-Khudri], that the messenger Abdul Qais when facing Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam with like [Ibn Ulayyah's] hadith, only in it it says, "And in it you mix with dates, or dates and water," and he doesn't say, "[Said] said,' or said, 'with dates'."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ الْبَصْرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ عَنْ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ ح و حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو قَزَعَةَ أَنَّ أَبَا نَضْرَةَ أَخْبَرَهُ وَحَسَنًا أَخْبَرَهُمَا أَنَّ أَبَا سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيَّ أَخْبَرَهُأَنَّ وَفْدَ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ لَمَّا أَتَوْا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالُوا يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ جَعَلَنَا اللَّهُ فِدَاءَكَ مَاذَا يَصْلُحُ لَنَا مِنْ الْأَشْرِبَةِ فَقَالَ لَا تَشْرَبُوا فِي النَّقِيرِ قَالُوا يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ جَعَلَنَا اللَّهُ فِدَاءَكَ أَوَ تَدْرِي مَا النَّقِيرُ قَالَ نَعَمْ الْجِذْعُ يُنْقَرُ وَسَطُهُ وَلَا فِي الدُّبَّاءِ وَلَا فِي الْحَنْتَمَةِ وَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالْمُوكَى
items.id: Has told me [Muhammad bin Bakkar al-Basri] has told us [Abu Ashim] from [Ibn Juraij]. (in another narration it is stated), And he told me [Muhammad bin Rafi'] and the lafazh belonged to him. Has told us [Abdurrazzaq] has told us [Ibn Juraij] he said, has told us [Abu Qaza'ah] that [Abu Nadlrah] reported it, and al-Hasan reported to both of them, that [Abu Sa'id al-Khudri] reported to him, that the messenger Abdul Qais when he came to the Prophet of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said, "O Prophet of Allah, may Allah make us as your ransom, what drink is good for us?" He answered: "Do not drink at an-Naqir." They asked, "O Prophet of Allah, may Allah make us your ransom, do you know what an-Naqir is?" He answered: "Yes, the trunk of a tree has its middle carved, and you must not drink in ad-Duba` or in al-Hantam, and you should (drink drinks stored in) containers with the heads covered."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ وَأَبُو كُرَيْبٍ وَإِسْحَقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ جَمِيعًا عَنْ وَكِيعٍ قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ زَكَرِيَّاءَ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ صَيْفِيٍّ عَنْ أَبِي مَعْبَدٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ عَنْ مُعَاذِ بْنِ جَبَلٍ قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ رُبَّمَا قَالَ وَكِيعٌ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ أَنَّ مُعَاذًا قَالَبَعَثَنِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ إِنَّكَ تَأْتِي قَوْمًا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ فَادْعُهُمْ إِلَى شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ فَإِنْ هُمْ أَطَاعُوا لِذَلِكَ فَأَعْلِمْهُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ افْتَرَضَ عَلَيْهِمْ خَمْسَ صَلَوَاتٍ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ وَلَيْلَةٍ فَإِنْ هُمْ أَطَاعُوا لِذَلِكَ فَأَعْلِمْهُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ افْتَرَضَ عَلَيْهِمْ صَدَقَةً تُؤْخَذُ مِنْ أَغْنِيَائِهِمْ فَتُرَدُّ فِي فُقَرَائِهِمْ فَإِنْ هُمْ أَطَاعُوا لِذَلِكَ فَإِيَّاكَ وَكَرَائِمَ أَمْوَالِهِمْ وَاتَّقِ دَعْوَةَ الْمَظْلُومِ فَإِنَّهُ لَيْسَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ اللَّهِ حِجَابٌحَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ حَدَّثَنَا زَكَرِيَّاءُ بْنُ إِسْحَقَ ح و حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ عَنْ زَكَرِيَّاءَ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ صَيْفِيٍّ عَنْ أَبِي مَعْبَدٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بَعَثَ مُعَاذًا إِلَى الْيَمَنِ فَقَالَ إِنَّكَ سَتَأْتِي قَوْمًا بِمِثْلِ حَدِيثِ وَكِيعٍ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] and [Abu Kuraib], and [Ishaq bin Ibrahim] all from [Waki'], [Abu Bakr] said, has told us [Waki'] from [Zakariya bin Ishaq] he said, has told me [Yahya bin Abdullah bin Shaifi] from [Abu Ma'bad] from [Ibn Abbas] from [Mu'adz bin Jabal], Abu Bakr said, "Perhaps," Waki' said, from Ibn Abbas, that Mu'adz said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam sent me. He said: "Indeed, you will come to a people from the People of the Book, so invite them to testify that there is no god (worthy of worship) but Allah, and that I am the messenger of Allah. If they obey you in this matter, then tell them that Allah has made it mandatory for them to pray five times every day and night. If they obey you in this matter, then tell them that Allah has made obligatory upon them alms taken from the rich and distributed to the poor among them. If they obey you in this way, then you will keep away from their noble treasures. Be afraid of the prayer of the oppressed, for there is no barrier between him and Allah'." Has narrated to us [Ibn Abu Umar] has narrated to us [Bisyr bin as-Sari] has narrated to us [Zakariya' bin Ishaq]. Ma'bad] from [Ibn Abbas], that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam sent Mu'adz to Yemen, so he said: "Indeed you will come to a people."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أُمَيَّةُ بْنُ بِسْطَامَ الْعَيْشِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ زُرَيْعٍ حَدَّثَنَا رَوْحٌ وَهُوَ ابْنُ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ إِسْمَعِيلَ بْنِ أُمَيَّةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ صَيْفِيٍّ عَنْ أَبِي مَعْبَدٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍأَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَمَّا بَعَثَ مُعَاذًا إِلَى الْيَمَنِ قَالَ إِنَّكَ تَقْدَمُ عَلَى قَوْمٍ أَهْلِ كِتَابٍ فَلْيَكُنْ أَوَّلَ مَا تَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَيْهِ عِبَادَةُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فَإِذَا عَرَفُوا اللَّهَ فَأَخْبِرْهُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ فَرَضَ عَلَيْهِمْ خَمْسَ صَلَوَاتٍ فِي يَوْمِهِمْ وَلَيْلَتِهِمْ فَإِذَا فَعَلُوا فَأَخْبِرْهُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ فَرَضَ عَلَيْهِمْ زَكَاةً تُؤْخَذُ مِنْ أَغْنِيَائِهِمْ فَتُرَدُّ عَلَى فُقَرَائِهِمْ فَإِذَا أَطَاعُوا بِهَا فَخُذْ مِنْهُمْ وَتَوَقَّ كَرَائِمَ أَمْوَالِهِمْ
items.id: Has told us [Umayyah bin Bistham al-Aisyi] has told us [Yazid bin Zura'i`] has told us [Rauh] - namely Ibn al-Qasim - from [Ismail bin Umayyah] from [Yahya bin Abdullah bin Shaifi] from [Abu Ma'bad] from [Ibn Abbas] that Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam when sending Mu'adz to Yemen, he said: "Indeed you are facing a people of the People of the Book, then the first will that you preach to them is the worship of Allah azza wa jalla, if they know Allah, then tell them that Allah has made it mandatory for them to pray five times a day and night. When they do this then tell them that Allah has made obligatory zakat on them to be taken from their rich and then distributed to their poor. If they obey you in this, then take zakat from them and be afraid of their noble treasures."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ حَدَّثَنَا لَيْثُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ عَنْ عُقَيْلٍ عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُتْبَةَ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَلَمَّا تُوُفِّيَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَاسْتُخْلِفَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ بَعْدَهُ وَكَفَرَ مَنْ كَفَرَ مِنْ الْعَرَبِ قَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ لِأَبِي بَكْرٍ كَيْفَ تُقَاتِلُ النَّاسَ وَقَدْ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ حَتَّى يَقُولُوا لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَمَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَقَدْ عَصَمَ مِنِّي مَالَهُ وَنَفْسَهُ إِلَّا بِحَقِّهِ وَحِسَابُهُ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَقَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَاللَّهِ لَأُقَاتِلَنَّ مَنْ فَرَّقَ بَيْنَ الصَّلَاةِ وَالزَّكَاةِ فَإِنَّ الزَّكَاةَ حَقُّ الْمَالِ وَاللَّهِ لَوْ مَنَعُونِي عِقَالًا كَانُوا يُؤَدُّ��نَهُ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَقَاتَلْتُهُمْ عَلَى مَنْعِهِفَقَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ فَوَاللَّهِ مَا هُوَ إِلَّا أَنْ رَأَيْتُ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ قَدْ شَرَحَ صَدْرَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ لِلْقِتَالِ فَعَرَفْتُ أَنَّهُ الْحَقُّ
items.id: Has told us [Qutaibah bin Sa'id] has told us [Laits bin Sa'ad] from [Uqail] from [az-Zuhri] he said, has told us [Ubaidullah bin Abdullah bin Utbah bin Mas'ud] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "When the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam died, and Abu Bakr was appointed caliph after him, and the disbelievers from among the Arabs did disbelief, then [Umar bin al-Khaththab] said to Abu Bakr, 'How is it possible that you will fight humans, when the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam has said: "I was ordered to fight humans until they say, 'There is no god (that has the right to be worshipped) but Allah', then whoever says, 'There is no god (that has the right to be worshiped) but Allah', then indeed he has guarded his property and soul from (my attacks) except by right. Islam, and the reckoning is left to Allah.' So [Abu Bakr] said, 'By Allah, I will truly fight those who differentiate between prayer and zakat, because zakat is (a claim) on property. By Allah, if they hinder me because of their unwillingness even though they have paid it to the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, I will still fight them because of their unwillingness.' So [Umar bin al-Khaththab] said, 'By Allah it is not him but that I saw Allah had opened Abu Bakr's chest to fight (them) then I knew that he was the truth'."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الطَّاهِرِ وَحَرْمَلَةُ بْنُ يَحْيَى وَأَحْمَدُ بْنُ عِيسَى قَالَ أَحْمَدُ حَدَّثَنَا و قَالَ الْآخَرَانِ أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي يُونُسُ عَنْ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَعِيدُ بْنُ الْمُسَيَّبِ أَنَّ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ أَخْبَرَهُأَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ حَتَّى يَقُولُوا لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَمَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ عَصَمَ مِنِّي مَالَهُ وَنَفْسَهُ إِلَّا بِحَقِّهِ وَحِسَابُهُ عَلَى اللَّهِ
items.id: And it has told me [Abu ath-Tahir] and [Harmalah bin Yahya] and [Ahmad bin Isa], [Ahmad] said, 'It has told us'. While two other people said, 'He has told us [Ibn Wahb] he said, he has informed me [Yunus] from [Ibn Shihab] he said, he has told me [Sa'id bin al-Musayyab] that [Abu Hurairah] reported to him, that the Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him) said: "I was ordered to fight people until they say, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah', then whoever says, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshiped) but Allah', then indeed he has protected his property and soul from (my attacks) except by the right of Islam, and his reckoning is left to Allah."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدَةَ الضَّبِّيُّ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ يَعْنِي الدَّرَاوَرْدِيَّ عَنْ الْعَلَاءِ ح و حَدَّثَنَا أُمَيَّةُ بْنُ بِسْطَامَ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ زُرَيْعٍ حَدَّثَنَا رَوْحٌ عَنْ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَعَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ حَتَّى يَشْهَدُوا أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَيُؤْمِنُوا بِي وَبِمَا جِئْتُ بِهِ فَإِذَا فَعَلُوا ذَلِكَ عَصَمُوا مِنِّي دِمَاءَهُمْ وَأَمْوَالَهُمْ إِلَّا بِحَقِّهَا وَحِسَابُهُمْ عَلَى اللَّهِ
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Abdah adl-Dlabbi] has told us [Abdul Aziz] -namely ad-Darawardi- from [al-Ala']. (in another narration it is mentioned) And has told us [Umayyah bin Bistham] and the lafazh is his, has told us [Yazid bin Zura'i] has told us [Rauh] from [al-Ala' bin Abdurrahman bin Ya'qub] from [his father] from [Abu Hurairah] from Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, he said: "I was ordered to fight humans until they testify that there is no god (who have the right to be worshipped) but Allah and believe in me and in the Koran that I have brought, then if they say this, then indeed they have protected their property and souls from (my attacks) unless it is due to the rights of Islam and their reckoning is left to Allah."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصُ بْنُ غِيَاثٍ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ عَنْ جَابِرٍ وَعَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ بِمِثْلِ حَدِيثِ ابْنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ح و حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ ح و حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ يَعْنِي ابْنَ مَهْدِيٍّ قَالَا جَمِيعًا حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ حَتَّى يَقُولُوا لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَإِذَا قَالُوا لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ عَصَمُوا مِنِّي دِمَاءَهُمْ وَأَمْوَالَهُمْ إِلَّا بِحَقِّهَا وَحِسَابُهُمْ عَلَى اللَّهِ ثُمَّ قَرَأَ{ إِنَّمَا أَنْتَ مُذَكِّرٌ لَسْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِمُسَيْطِرٍ }
items.id: And it has been told to us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Hafsh bin Ghiyats] from [al-A'masy] from [Abu Sufyan] from [Jabir] from [Abu Salih] from [Abu Hurairah] both of them said, "Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "I was ordered to fight humans' as per the hadith of Ibn al-Musayyab from Abu Hurairah. (in another narration it is stated) And it has been told to me [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Waki']. (in another narration it is mentioned) And it has been told to me [Muhammad bin al-Mutsanna] has told us [Abdurrahman] - namely bin Mahdi - both of them said, have told us [Sufyan] from [Abu az-Zubair] from [Jabir] he said, "The Messenger of Allah said: "I was ordered to fight people until they say, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshiped) but Allah', so they said, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshiped) worshiped) but Allah', then indeed they have protected their property and souls from (my attacks) except due to the rights of Islam. And their reckoning is left to Allah. Then he read: '(Indeed you are (only) warners. You have absolutely no power over them)' (Qs. Al Ghaasyiyah: 21-22).

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو غَسَّانَ الْمِسْمَعِىُّ مَالِكُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَاحِدِ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ وَاقِدِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أُقَاتِلَ النَّاسَ حَتَّى يَشْهَدُوا أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَيُقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَيُؤْتُوا الزَّكَاةَ فَإِذَا فَعَلُوا عَصَمُوا مِنِّي دِمَاءَهُمْ وَأَمْوَالَهُمْ إِلَّا بِحَقِّهَا وَحِسَابُهُمْ عَلَى اللَّهِ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Ghassan al-Misma'i Malik bin Abdul Wahid] has told us [Abdul Malik bin ash-Shabbah] from [Syu'bah] from [Waqid bin Muhammad bin Zaid bin Abdullah bin Umar] from [his father] from [Abdullah bin Umar] he said: "I was ordered to fight the people until they testify that there is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah and that Muhammad is the messenger of Allah, they established pray, and pay zakat. So if they do this, then indeed they have protected their property and souls from (my attacks), unless it is due to Islamic rights and their reckoning is submitted to Allah."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ وَابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا مَرْوَانُ يَعْنِيَانِ الْفَزَارِيَّ عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَسَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ مَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَكَفَرَ بِمَا يُعْبَدُ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ حَرُمَ مَالُهُ وَدَمُهُ وَحِسَابُهُ عَلَى اللَّهِو حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْأَحْمَرُ ح وَحَدَّثَنِيهِ زُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ كِلَاهُمَا عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ مَنْ وَحَّدَ اللَّهَ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ بِمِثْلِهِ
items.id: And has told us [Suwaid bin Sa'id] and [Ibn Abu Umar] both said, has told us [Marwan] both of them meant Marwan al-Fazari, from [Abu Malik] from [his father] he said, "I heard the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "Whoever says that there is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah, and discredits anything that is worshiped other than Allah, then his wealth and blood are haram, and his reward is with Allah." And he has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] has told us [Abu Khalid al-Ahmar]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And has told me about him [Zuhair bin Harb] has told us [Yazid bin Harun] both from [Abu Malik] from [his father] that he heard the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "Whoever believes in monotheism of Allah," then mentions something like that."

items.arab: و حَدَّثَنِي حَرْمَلَةُ بْنُ يَحْيَى التُّجِيبِيُّ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ وَهْبٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي يُونُسُ عَنْ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي سَعِيدُ بْنُ الْمُسَيَّبِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَلَمَّا حَضَرَتْ أَبَا طَالِبٍ الْوَفَاةُ جَاءَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَوَجَدَ عِنْدَهُ أَبَا جَهْلٍ وَعَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ أَبِي أُمَيَّةَ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَا عَمِّ قُلْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ كَلِمَةً أَشْهَدُ لَكَ بِهَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ أَبُو جَهْلٍ وَعَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي أُمَيَّةَ يَا أَبَا طَالِبٍ أَتَرْغَبُ عَنْ مِلَّةِ عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ فَلَمْ يَزَلْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَعْرِضُهَا عَلَيْهِ وَيُعِيدُ لَهُ تِلْكَ الْمَقَالَةَ حَتَّى قَالَ أَبُو طَالِبٍ آخِرَ مَا كَلَّمَهُمْ هُوَ عَلَى مِلَّةِ عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ وَأَبَى أَنْ يَقُولَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَمَا وَاللَّهِ لَأَسْتَغْفِرَنَّ لَكَ مَا لَمْ أُنْهَ عَنْكَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ{ مَا كَانَ لِلنَّبِيِّ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنْ يَسْتَغْفِرُوا لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ وَلَوْ كَانُوا أُولِي قُرْبَى مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمْ أَنَّهُمْ أَصْحَابُ الْجَحِيمِ }وَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى فِي أَبِي طَالِبٍ فَقَالَ لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ{ إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَهْدِي مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِالْمُهْتَدِينَ }و حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ قَالَا أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَخْبَرَنَا مَعْمَرٌ ح و حَدَّثَنَا حَسَنٌ الْحُلْوَانِيُّ وَعَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ وَهُوَ ابْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ سَعْدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ صَالِحٍ كِلَاهُمَا عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ مِثْلَهُ غَيْرَ أَنَّ حَدِيثَ صَالِحٍ انْتَهَى عِنْدَ قَوْلِهِ فَأَنْزَلَ الل��َهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فِيهِ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ الْآيَتَيْنِ وَقَالَ فِي حَدِيثِهِ وَيَعُودَانِ فِي تِلْكَ الْمَقَالَةِ وَفِي حَدِيثِ مَعْمَرٍ مَكَانَ هَذِهِ الْكَلِمَةِ فَلَمْ يَزَالَا بِهِ
items.id: And it has been told to me [Harmalah bin Yahya at-Tujibi] has told me [Abdullah bin Wahb] he said, has told me [Yunus] from [Ibn Shihab] he said, has told me [Said bin al-Musayyab] from [his father] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam visited Abu Talib at a time when he was facing death. He found Abu Jahl and Abdullah bin Abu Umaiyyah bin al-Mughirah also there. Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Uncle! Say the Two Kalimah Creed, I will be your witness before Allah." Then Abu Jahl and Abdullah bin Abu Umayyah said, 'O Abu Talib, are you able to leave the religion of Abdul Muttalib? reciting the Kalimah Shahada. Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam also said: "By Allah, I will ask forgiveness from Allah for you," so Allah revealed the verse: '(It is not permissible for the Prophet and those who believe to ask forgiveness for those who shirk, even if they are their own relatives after it has become clear to them that those shirks are members of Hell)' (Qs. At Taubah: 113). Abu Talib's incident: '(Indeed, you, O Muhammad, do not have the power to give guidance to anyone you love so that he accepts Islam, but Allah is the one who has the power to give guidance to those whom He wills, and He is the one who knows better who are the people who are (willing) to receive guidance to embrace Islam)' (Qs. Al Qashash: 56). [Abdurrazzaq] has told us [Ma'mar]. (in another narration it is mentioned) And has told us [Hasan al-Hulwani] and [Abd bin Humaid] both said, has told us [Ya'qub] - namely Ibn Ibrahim bin Sa'ad - he said, has told us [my father] from [Salih] both from [az-Zuhri] with this sanad for example revealed His word about it,' and he did not mention these two verses. And he mentioned in his hadith, 'And they both said these words again,' in the Ma'mar hadith as a substitute for this sentence.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبَّادٍ وَابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا مَرْوَانُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ كَيْسَانَ عَنْ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِعَمِّهِ عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ قُلْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ أَشْهَدُ لَكَ بِهَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَأَبَى فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ{ إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ }الْآيَةَ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Abbad] and [Ibn Abu Umar] both said, has told us [Marwan] from [Yazid] - namely Ibn Kaisan - from [Abu Hazim] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allaah be upon him) said to his uncle when he was about to die: 'Say, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshiped other than Allah' I will surely testify to you with these words on the Day of Resurrection." But he refused, then Allah revealed: '(Indeed you will not be able to guide those you love) ' (Qs. Al Qashash: 56).

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَاتِمِ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ كَيْسَانَ عَنْ أَبِي حَازِمٍ الْأَشْجَعِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِعَمِّهِ قُلْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ أَشْهَدُ لَكَ بِهَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ قَالَ لَوْلَا أَنْ تُعَيِّرَنِي قُرَيْشٌ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّمَا حَمَلَهُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ الْجَزَعُ لَأَقْرَرْتُ بِهَا عَيْنَكَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ{ إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَهْدِي مَنْ يَشَاءُ }
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Hatim bin Maimun] has told us [Yahya bin Sa'id] has told us [Yazid bin Kaisan] from [Abu Hazim al-Asyja'i] from [Abu Hurairah] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said to his uncle when he was about to die: 'Say, 'There is no god (who has the right to be worshiped other than Allah' I will surely testify to you with this sentence on the Day of Resurrection.'

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ وَزُهَيْرُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ كِلَاهُمَا عَنْ إِسْمَعِيلَ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عُلَيَّةَ عَنْ خَالِدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ مَاتَ وَهُوَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الْمُقَدَّمِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْمُفَضَّلِ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ الْحَذَّاءُ عَنْ الْوَلِيدِ أَبِي بِشْرٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ حُمْرَانَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ عُثْمَانَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ مِثْلَهُ سَوَاءً
items.id: Has told us [Abu Bakr bin Abu Syaibah] and [Zuhair bin Harb] both from [Ismail bin Ibrahim], [Abu Bakr] said, has told us [Ibn Ulayyah] from [Khalid] he said, has told us [al-Walid bin Muslim] from [Humran] from [Uthman] he said, "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Whoever dies while he knows that there is no god (who has the right to be worshipped) but Allah, he will surely enter Paradise." It has been told to us [Muhammad bin Abu Bakr al-Muqaddami] has told us [Bisyr bin al-Mufadldlal] has told us [Khalid al-Hadzdza'] from [al-Walid Abu Bisyr] he said, I heard [Humran] say, I heard [Uthman] say, I heard Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said the same thing."
